name: io.github.foculoom/tom
description: Digital Twin MCP server for cross-repo analysis and AI twin synchronization. Provides tools for repository impact analysis, continuation prompts, and twin state management.

environmentVariables.description: Python command to use for running the MCP server
environmentVariables.name: DTWIN_PYTHON_COMMAND

name: io.github.foculoom/openai-image
description: OpenAI GPT-4 image generation MCP server using gpt-image-1 model. Generates images from text prompts with support for custom output directories.

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4 image generation
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Directory path for generated image output
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HF_WORK_DIR

name: io.github.foculoom/suno
description: Suno AI music and audio generation MCP server. Creates music clips and audio from text prompts with custom style control.

environmentVariables.description: Suno API key or authentication token
environmentVariables.name: SUNO_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Directory path for generated audio output
environmentVariables.name: AUDIO_OUTPUT_DIR

name: io.github.foculoom/fal-ai
description: Fal.ai MCP server for Flux Kontext image generation with character consistency. Supports multi-frame sprite generation with high identity preservation.

environmentVariables.description: Fal.ai API key for image generation
environmentVariables.name: FAL_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Directory path for generated image output
environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_OUTPUT_DIR
